AIHomeDestination.description: Business destinations owned by the AI module shell. This is not a platform route class or UI widget type.

AIHomePanel.description: Transient auxiliary panel displayed alongside or above the main AI content.

isAuthenticated.description: Derived from AccountSession; false must route to login instead of AI home.

entryDestination.description: Default AI module destination after login. Current product uses chat.

selectedHistoryId.description: History conversation loaded in the chat surface. Null means a new conversation/template state.

activePanel.description: Currently open auxiliary panel. Current iOS ContainerViewController uses history as a slide-out panel.
